case_title: MARGARET M. WRIGHT VS. MICHELE B. CORASH

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,569.84 FILED BY WRIGHT, MARGARET M. DBA MARNIE WRIGHT DESIGN AS TO DEFENDANT CORASH, MICHELE B. (@ MORRISON & FOERSTER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, MARGARET M. DBA MARNIE WRIGHT DESIGN

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00);THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, MARGARET M. DBA MARNIE WRIGHT DESIGN AS TO DEFENDANT CORASH, MICHELE B. (@ MORRISON & FOERSTER)
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-04-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-02-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED OCT-22-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CORASH, MICHELE B. (@ MORRISON & FOERSTER)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, MARGARET M. DBA MARNIE WRIGHT DESIGN
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY WRIGHT, MARGARET M. DBA MARNIE WRIGHT DESIGN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (AMENDED) SERVED OCT-23-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CORASH, MICHELE B. (@ MORRISON & FOERSTER)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF CURE DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-11-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO RE-SERVE DEFENDANT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MARGARET WRIGHT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY WRIGHT, MARGARET M. DBA MARNIE WRIGHT DESIGN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, MARGARET M. DBA MARNIE WRIGHT DESIGN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MARGARET WRIGHT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, MARGARET M. DBA MARNIE WRIGHT DESIGN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORASH, MICHELE B. (@ MORRISON & FOERSTER) $9,569.84 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,679.84, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. IN ABSENCE OF DEFENDANT, PLAINTIFFS CASE WAS CREDITED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - SENT TO DEFENDANT
